summary: High‑fidelity audience recording of a 1988 show captured on Sennheiser 421s mics, delivering an awesome performance praised by fans.
review: Both reviewers give the recording top marks, noting that the tape – taped by Mark McCue and Lucien Zaleski with Sennheiser 421 microphones – has been carefully transferred, edited, pitch‑corrected and cross‑faded to smooth out pauses. The show itself is described as "awesome" and the overall listening experience is judged excellent.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviews are 5‑star, highlighting superb sound quality and an outstanding performance; limited number of reviews reduces confidence to medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Recorded with Sennheiser 421s mics (taped by McCue & Zaleski); pitch correction applied on Set 2, crossfades added to smooth tape pauses, Shnid=90776 used for missing tape flip patches.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; reviewers simply describe the show as awesome.
